title: jasminum humile var. microphyllum
intro: Jasminum humile var. microphyllum, also known as dwarf or prostrate jasmine, is a compact, low-growing variety of the Jasminum humile species, characterized by its small, delicate leaves and tiny, fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum humile var. microphyllum include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and support digestive health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
